description: oh-my-gemini default hook configuration. Copy to .gemini/omg-config.json to customize.

phaseGates.description: When strict=true, phase gates block progression until user confirms. When false, shows advisory message.

autoVerification.description: Automatically run typecheck and lint after code file modifications.

security.description: Security settings for file operations and shell commands.

researcher.description: Read-only + web search for research tasks

architect.description: Read-only for analysis and design tasks

executor.description: Full access for implementation (with security gates)

toolFilter.description: Filter available tools based on detected agent mode.

ralph.description: Persistence mode (Ralph) - automatically retry on failure with alternative approaches.

contextInjection.description: Dynamically inject context based on task type.
